summary: CA Summary Report feature testing completed - All backend tests pass (9/9), frontend CA Summary tab fully functional with KPI cards and table visible

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - non-blocking cosmetic issue

ca_report_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/ca-report returns correct structure with month, total_employees, total_advances_this_month, total_unpaid_balance, over_limit_employees, employees array

ca_report_filtering.details: CA report correctly filters by branch_id and month (YYYY-MM format) parameters

ca_report_employee_fields.details: Employee data includes: monthly_ca_limit, this_month_total, this_month_count, over_limit_count, prev_month_overage, usage_pct, is_over_limit, unpaid_balance

ca_summary_tab_ui.details: CA Summary tab visible in Reports page with 4 KPI cards (Total Employees, Advances This Month, Total Unpaid Balance, Over-Limit Employees)

ca_summary_table.details: Table shows all columns: Employee, Branch, Monthly Limit, This Month, Usage, Over-Limit, Prev Month Overage, Unpaid Balance, Last Advance

over_limit_highlighting.details: Over-limit employees highlighted with red row background and 200% usage bar, shows '1x approved' badge

daily_close_preview_ca_fields.details: daily-close-preview endpoint returns is_over_ca, monthly_ca_limit, monthly_ca_total for Employee Advance expenses

daily_report_ca_fields.details: daily-report endpoint returns advance_expenses with proper CA fields

employee_ca_summary.details: /employees/{id}/ca-summary returns monthly limit, this_month_total, is_over_limit, remaining

seed_data_creation: Used existing Employee Advance test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: CA Summary Report feature is complete and working. GET /api/employees/ca-report endpoint is correctly placed BEFORE /{emp_id} routes. Daily operations endpoints (daily-report, daily-log, daily-close-preview, daily-close) all return is_over_ca, monthly_ca_limit, monthly_ca_total for Employee Advance expenses. The Close Wizard page requires selecting a specific branch (not 'All Branches') to display content.
